steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage moves from an action (NASA crashing a probe into Dimorphos) to a result (Dimorphos's orbital period being altered). The transition must show that the second statement is a consequence of the first.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Consequently” establishes the cause-effect relationship, showing the orbital change was a result of the probe impact.

The other three choices fail to create this causal connection: “Specifically” narrows focus, “In comparison” introduces contrast, and “In addition” adds unrelated information.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
